aboutMe.content:
My name is Chanel, 🌹
Back to Madrid for a short season 🗓️ , offering incalls and outcalls, 100% ✅ REAL PICTURES and VIDEOS please visit my website.
I’m 100% independent!
I speak ENGLISH AND SPANISH

Please I appreciate to introduce yourself when you contact me, your origin, age, when do you want to meet and time.

I’m independent hot 🔥 latina girl! I can define my self as sexy, elegant and sensual an affectionate, polite and charming woman if you are looking for the best company for a dinner date, relax or a private date I’m your girl!
My apartment is located in the city center parking nearby or I’m also available to visit at your hotel.
My hair is natural not extensions, manicure and pedicure always on point.

I specially define myself as woman of the world well traveled and educated, intelligent person who also values your treatment to me, you will reward my dear.
If I blur my face is because I do other activities I have a personal carrier in my private life, so please respect that, I used to work in spain and Norway I could provide my real reviews from there, I loved to provide high quick services you will never disappointed a real treatment as a lovers! If you decide to book and appointment for a hotel visit or dinner I can guarantee Im a polite and smart girl in public, elegance and a good conversation as a old friends, In private you will have the perfect latina to spoils in all your fantasies 😈
The man who is with me will always be well treated and satisfied
In life there are two things that have a lot of importance to me, it is respect and love! More things about me you will able to know the date you will have my in your arms, please I only meet gentleman with excellent manners,
Your generosity will reward by me. Looking forward to seeing you 🫶🏼

full service except anal

Prices:
1 h incall 200 euros per hour
Outcall 1 hour 220 euros plus taxi

elements.title: Mejores escorts y putas del mundo

faqs.title: ¿Cómo puedo reservar una cita con Chanel?
faqs.content:
Puedes reservar una cita con Chanel de dos maneras:

  • Enviar un mensaje secreto directamente en la plataforma.
  • Contactar a través de las siguientes opciones de contacto telefónico: llamada telefónica, SMS, WhatsApp.

faqs.title: ¿Qué idiomas habla Chanel?
faqs.content: Chanel habla habla inglés y español.

faqs.title: ¿Dónde puedo encontrarme con Chanel?
faqs.content: Chanel se encuentra actualmente en Madrid. No está viajando por el momento, pero no dudes en enviarle un mensaje si deseas encontrarte con ella en tu ciudad.

faqs.title: ¿Las fotos de Chanel son reales y verificadas?
faqs.content: Todas las fotos de Chanel han sido verificadas por el equipo de seguridad y control de calidad de TopEscortBabes. La última foto fue verificada y autenticada hace 2 años.
